title: agrostis collina
intro: Agrostis collina, also known as redtop, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis collina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Agrostis collina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
